previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards under pressure inside the 50m.
Raced keenly through the early stages.
Began awkwardly making contact with The Defender.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign when last of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw November 4 over 1200m, 7 len behind Mr Nunez carrying 57kg at $4.40. First up last campaign second of 13 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw July 21 over 1200m, soft track; 1.75 len behind Mickidamuzz carrying 55.5kg at $13. Definite winning hope.
